Class Task

java.lang.Object
main.java.taskmanager.model.Task
public class Task extends Object
Represents a Task managed by the application A Task contains a description, creation date, due date and completion date, a task is considered incomplete until completionDate has a date

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Task(String description, LocalDateTime dueDate)
    Creates a new incomplete task
    Task(UUID id, String description, LocalDateTime creationDate, LocalDateTime dueDate, LocalDateTime completedDate)
    Recreates a task from existing stored Data

  • Constructor Details

    • Task

      public Task(String description, LocalDateTime dueDate)
      Creates a new incomplete task
      Parameters:
      description - the task description
      dueDate - the date and time the task is due

    • Task

      public Task(UUID id, String description, LocalDateTime creationDate, LocalDateTime dueDate, LocalDateTime completedDate)
      Recreates a task from existing stored Data
      Parameters:
      id - the unique task ID
      description - the task description
      creationDate - the date adn time the task was created
      dueDate - the date and time the task is due
      completedDate - the data and time the task was completed

  • Method Details

      public String getDescription()

    • getDueDate

    • getCompletedDate

      public LocalDateTime getCompletedDate()

    • isCompleted

      public boolean isCompleted()
      checks whether the task has been completed
      Returns:
      true if the task has been completed, otherwise false

    • setDescription

      public void setDescription(String description)

    • setDueDate

      public void setDueDate(LocalDateTime dueDate)

    • setComplete

      public void setComplete(boolean complete)
      Updates the task completion state.

      completing the task records the current date and time. Marking it incomplete clears the completed data.

      Parameters:
      complete - true to mark the task complete, false to mark it as incomplete.

      public String toString()
      Overrides:
